zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Shelley於大約1480年出生時，他的父親John Shelley30歲，母親Elizabeth Michelgrove20歲。他和Mary Urdiswicke至少有1個兒子。他去世於1514年7月3日在英國英格蘭素可享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Shelley于大约1480年出生时，他的父亲John Shelley30岁，母亲Elizabeth Michelgrove20岁。他和Mary Urdiswicke至少有1个儿子。他去世于1514年7月3日在英国英格兰素可享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Shelley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Shelley (Essex, Suffolk, Yorkshire) or from Shelley Plain in Crawley (Sussex). The placenames all derive from Old English scelf ‘rock, ledge, shelf’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Irish (Laois): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Sealbhaigh ‘descendant of Sealbhach’, a byname from the adjective sealbhach ‘having possessions, wealthy’.

variants.name: Shallow
meanings: Irish (Kilkenny and Wexford): variant of   Shelley  .
English: nickname from Middle English shalou(e) ‘shallow’, conjectured also to mean ‘thin’; perhaps also the same word in the topographic sense of ‘shallow place in a stretch of water’.

variants.name: Shelly
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Shelley  .

variants.name: Sheley
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Shelley  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Shelley was born about 1480, his father, John Shelley, was 30 and his mother, Elizabeth Michelgrove, was 20. He had at least 1 son with Mary Urdiswicke. He died on 3 July 1514, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Shelley est né environ 1480, son père, John Shelley, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Michelgrove, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mary Urdiswicke. Il est décédé le 3 juillet 1514, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Shelley um 1480 geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Shelley 30 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Michelgrove 20. Er hatte mit Mary Urdiswicke mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 3. Juli 1514 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Shelley è nato il circa 1480, il suo padre, John Shelley, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Michelgrove, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mary Urdiswicke. Morì il 3 luglio 1514, nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Shelleyが約1480年に生まれた時，父John Shelleyは30歳，母Elizabeth Michelgroveは20歳であった。彼はMary Urdiswickeとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1514年7月3日にイギリスイギリススセックスで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Shelley(이)가 대략 1480년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Shelley(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Michelgrove(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Mary Urdiswicke(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1514년 7월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Shelley nasceu aproximadamente 1480, seu pai, John Shelley, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Michelgrove, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mary Urdiswicke. Ele faleceu em 3 de julho de 1514, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Shelley родился около 1480 г., его отцу по имени John Shelley было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Michelgrove, 20. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mary Urdiswicke. Он умер 3 июля 1514 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Shelley nació aproximadamente 1480, su papá, John Shelley, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Michelgrove, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mary Urdiswicke. Murió el 3 de julio de 1514, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 35 años.
